hero.headline: Your Family's Backyard Starts Here
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, DesRochers has designed and built custom pools for Northern Illinois families. From your first sketch to decades of crystal-clear water, we handle everything so you just enjoy the splash.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to weekly maintenance and hot tub sales, DesRochers is your single source for backyard living across Northern Illinois.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed fiberglass and vinyl liner pools built to fit your family's vision, your property, and your budget. From concept to first cannonball.

cards.title: Hot Tub Sales & Installation
cards.description: Premium Caldera and Fantasy hot tubs on display at our showrooms. We handle delivery, installation, and setup so you soak stress-free from day one.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly and seasonal maintenance that keeps your water balanced, your equipment running, and your pool crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Professional seasonal services that prep your pool for summer fun and protect it through harsh Illinois winters. One call, fully handled.

cards.title: Fiberglass & Vinyl Repair
cards.description: Expert fiberglass restoration and vinyl liner replacement that makes aging or damaged pools look brand new. We fix what others got wrong.

cards.title: Pool Supplies & Water Testing
cards.description: Three fully stocked retail locations with chemicals, equipment, patio furniture, and free expert water testing from Pentair, Hayward, and BioGuard.

how_it_works.headline: From Dream to Dive in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your backyard vision. We'll visit your property, discuss designs, and provide an honest quote with financing options. Zero pressure, zero obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles every detail — permits, excavation, plumbing, decking, and finishing. Three generations of craftsmanship go into every pool we build.

steps.title: Enjoy for Generations
steps.description: Your backyard oasis is ready. And with our ongoing maintenance, supplies, and service team behind you, your pool stays perfect for decades to come.

about.label: Why Northern Illinois Trusts Us
about.headline: Three Generations of Backyard Dreams, One Family Name
about.description: Since 1982, the DesRochers family has been turning Northern Illinois backyards into gathering places for families to make memories. With three retail locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris, award-winning pool designs, and a team that treats every project like their own backyard, we've earned the trust of our community one pool at a time.

features.title: Family-Owned, Three Locations
features.description: Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris — we're always nearby with fully stocked showrooms, expert staff, and same-week service.

features.title: Award-Winning Custom Designs
features.description: Our fiberglass and vinyl pool designs have earned industry recognition. Every pool is unique because every family is unique.

features.title: Customers for Life
features.description: From your first consultation to your 10th summer, we're here. Most of our customers have been with us for years — and their neighbors followed.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Financing Available.
pricing.subtitle: Whether you need a new pool, a hot tub, or weekly service — we'll give you an honest quote with options that fit your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with our work, we'll come back and make it right at no extra cost. We've been standing behind our craftsmanship for over 40 years — your satisfaction is the foundation of our family business.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 4-8 weeks from permit approval to completion, depending on the design complexity and weather. Fiberglass pools can be installed faster than vinyl. We'll give you a clear timeline during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool installations?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to help make your dream pool affordable. During your consultation, we'll walk you through payment plans that fit your budget so you can start enjoying your backyard sooner.

faqs.question: What's the difference between fiberglass and vinyl pools?
faqs.answer: Fiberglass pools are pre-formed shells that install quickly and require less maintenance. Vinyl liner pools offer more custom shapes and are typically lower upfront cost. We build both and will help you choose the best fit for your property and budget.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service team maintains and repairs all pool types regardless of who installed them. We've even fixed major issues left by other contractors and made pools look brand new again.

faqs.question: Which of your three locations should I visit?
faqs.answer: All three locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris carry pool supplies, chemicals, and accessories. Hot tubs are available at Wilmington and Shorewood. Visit whichever is closest — our staff at every location can help with water testing, product advice, and scheduling services.

testimonials.name: Leo R.
testimonials.text: DesRochers installed our inground pool 10 years ago and we're still impressed with the level of service this company provides. They've been our go-to for everything pool-related ever since.

testimonials.name: Jim K.
testimonials.text: DesRochers didn't only fix major mistakes by another pool company, they made it look brand new. The craftsmanship and attention to detail were outstanding.

testimonials.name: K. G.
testimonials.text: Our pool has been crystal clear all summer! The water chemistry is always perfect and the team is incredibly responsive. We are customers for life!
